ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conventions" (
  "convention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each convention */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Dates of the convention */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the convention was held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the convention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the convention */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Total number of attendees */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "nomination_type" TEXT /* Type of nomination (e.g., presidential, vice-presidential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("convention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conventions_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name for more detailed location information */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name to handle international conventions */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temporary_chairs" (
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temporary chair */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the temporary chair */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the temporary chair represents */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the temporary chair */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the temporary chair started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the temporary chair ended their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permanent_chairs" (
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permanent chair */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permanent chair */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the permanent chair represents */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the permanent chair */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the permanent chair started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the permanent chair ended their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the nominee */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the nominee represents */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the nominee is running for (president or vice-president) */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the nominee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the nominee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the nominee */,
  "profession" TEXT /* Profession of the nominee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "convention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the convention */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the nominee received */,
  "ballot_round" INTEGER /* Round number of the ballot */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of total votes received */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the nominee won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_convention_id FOREIGN KEY ("convention_id") REFERENCES conventions ("convention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "convention_nominees" (
  "convention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the convention */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the nominee is running for (president or vice-president) */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election the nominee is running in */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date of nomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("convention_id", "nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot */,
  "convention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the convention */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the ballot */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "ballot_status" TEXT /* Status of the ballot (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_convention_id FOREIGN KEY ("convention_id") REFERENCES conventions ("convention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the committee member */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the committee member represents */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the committee member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the member started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the member ended their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "convention_committees" (
  "convention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the convention */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee member */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Name of the committee the member is part of */,
  "committee_role" TEXT /* Role within the committee */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Brief description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("convention_id", "member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., party official, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "convention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the convention being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_convention_id FOREIGN KEY ("convention_id") REFERENCES conventions ("convention_id")
)
